## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and team structure updates.](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team restructure: Vivek joins as managing editor, Nika continues on account, Kyle focuses on client operations](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Content progress: 5 new articles generated, 8 pending review; podcast blog examples created for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [SEO analysis: Post-migration metrics on track; competitor keyword research conducted for strategic content planning](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Technical SEO: Docs migration complete; metadata optimization needed to resolve indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Holiday Plans

  - [Vivek introduced as new managing editor, to own strategy and delegation](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Nika continues working on the account](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Kyle shifts focus to client operations and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Two-week holiday break upcoming; ramping up efforts post-break](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [5 new articles generated this week, batch in progress](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [8 articles from last week pending review](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [2 test podcast blog posts created (episodes 1 and 6)](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Suggestion to integrate code images in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Kyle to share examples and new workflow approach for podcast blogs](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Pre vs. post-migration comparison:](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Pre-migration (90 days): Higher clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [Post-migration (\~50-60 days): On track if projected to double in next 40 days](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Competitor keyword analysis conducted:](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [File created listing competitor keywords, search intent, clusters, and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Plan to automate and filter keyword list based on Galileo's priorities](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [Example: "LLM performance" cluster identified as important](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

### Technical SEO Updates

  - [Migration from Rangai Docs to AI completed](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Indexing issues identified due to:](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
    1.  Missing meta descriptions
    2.  Missing technicals
    3.  Non-SEO-friendly titles
  - [Metadata optimization recommended for both domains](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [SEO audit document created, detailing issues like missing H2s and meta descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### Web Development Progress

  - [Shohil: Web dev team working on main domain changes](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Request to update existing spreadsheets for known issues to streamline dev work](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [New issues (e.g., missing canonicals) can be added as separate sections](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Galileo team to provide feedback on content batch (likely by Monday due to Conor's absence)](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Kyle to loop in Adam for content review support](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Web dev team to continue addressing technical SEO issues](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Conor to work on improving editing process with newly onboarded team members](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [GrowthX to await Galileo's input on keyword clusters and competitors for further research](https://fathom.video/share/tbH_wCEx_bnWEWV4msYxFVFPbr6MgvcF?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
